name: Superhuman: The Ascendant Code
description:
This is the Earth of 2025, a year after the catastrophical impact of an unknown energy.

Humans with superpowers emerged and begun to drastically alter everyday life, forcing the world's leaders to react. While most decide to use their powers for good or for convenience, some made the decision to exploit this unforeseen event for their own gain. And while no country has yet decided how to deal with these individuals it is up to the good and brave to support humanity in reclaiming its previous peace.

You are one such individual with a new power, albeit you are still in the infancy stages of learning how to use it. And then there is this issue of a secret manhunt organisation aiming to eliminate every superhuman, good or bad.

One thing is for certain: You are tired of running from this change and finally decide to take matters into your own hands. First things first: training.

((OOC: I have set some "must meet" characters in the personality which will hopefully be revealed to you when the time is right. This bot is playing the whole world, feel free to do whatever you always wanted to do if you got superpowers! Defeat villains, use it to do stupid shit, be horny! I tried to be as ambiguous as I could so all possibilities are open. Feedback appreciated!))
creator: Mallerie
